site.name: Mohetios.dev
site.description: A quiet technical notebook and workshop for software, product engineering, open-source work, and making useful things.
site.footer: Everything in a wonderfully good way, must be.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A simple command center for your audience, content, inbox, and system.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Unified signals, replies, and private notes in one workspace.

threads.title: Threads
threads.description: Email and contact-form conversations in one place.
threads.emptyDescription: Try a different search or filter.

workspace.selectDescription: Choose a conversation from the inbox to review and reply.
workspace.notesDisabled: Private notes need persistent storage and will be added later.

confirmTrash.title: Move conversation to trash?
confirmTrash.description: You can restore it later from the Trash tab.

confirmDeleteForever.title: Delete conversation forever?
confirmDeleteForever.description: This will permanently remove the message, replies, and timeline events from the database. This action cannot be undone.

lost.title: No lost leads
lost.description: Leads marked as lost will appear here.

all.title: No leads yet

select.title: Select a lead
select.description: Choose a lead to review details and next action.

newsletter.title: Newsletter

comments.description: Moderate article comments before they appear publicly.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your basic Mohetios account identity. This area is still experimental.

experimental.title: Experimental area
experimental.description: Member profiles, comments, and internal features are still being shaped. For now, this page only confirms your account access.

footer.workshopQuote: Build small things well. Observe. Iterate. Assemble.

sections.latestWritingDescription: Technical notes, product decisions, and implementation records from real work.
sections.labNotesDescription: Small experiments, rough prototypes, and early ideas that are still being tested.
sections.featuredProjectsDescription: Open-source work, product experiments, and useful things shaped under real constraints.
sections.principlesDescription: A few practical rules for keeping the work clear, useful, and grounded.

empty.blogDescription: Technical notes and essays will appear here.
empty.labDescription: Experiments, prototypes, and working notes will appear here.
empty.projectsDescription: System notes and case studies will appear here.

pages.blogDescription: Technical notes, product decisions, implementation records, and lessons from useful things that made it into the world.
pages.labDescription: Experiments, prototypes, research notes, and unfinished ideas worth tracking.
pages.projectsDescription: Open-source work, product experiments, and practical systems built in public.

notebook.title: Notes on building, thinking, and making useful things.
notebook.description: Essays, build notes, logs, and field notes from the workshop: paths of observation, testing, and slow making.
notebook.entriesDescription: A ruled notebook index, kept compact so the trail is easy to scan.

archive.title: From the archive
archive.note: Older notes remain part of the same workshop: decisions, constraints, experiments, and small patterns that still explain the work.

labIndex.title: Experiments, prototypes, and thoughts still taking shape.
labIndex.description: A place for open work: rough notes, small tests, technical questions, and ideas that may one day become useful things.

questions.testFirst: What can be tested before it is built?

labIndex.logsDescription: Open questions, prototypes, and small tests before they become finished work.

status.title: Prototype state
status.description: Lab notes are allowed to stay rough. Their job is to keep open questions visible before they turn into finished work.

systems.title: Useful things made from notes, experiments, and product questions.
systems.description: This is where rough ideas become working software, public experiments, and tools useful enough to keep.
systems.filesDescription: Each row is a small file: what was made, where it stands, and what it connects to.

status.title: Build state
status.description: Some things are polished. Some are still rough. The point is to keep the build path visible.

aboutWorkshop.title: A quiet workshop for ideas still being made.
aboutWorkshop.description: Mohetios is where I keep notes, experiments, product questions, technical decisions, and unfinished thoughts — things slowly shaped into useful work.

what.title: What is Mohetios?
what.description: Mohetios is not just a portfolio, and not only a blog. It is a living notebook and quiet workshop for software, product engineering, open-source work, and the practice of making useful things.

name.title: The name
name.description: The name gives shape to a public technical identity: personal, a little strange, and close to the feeling of a small school of thought.
name.standard: Everything in a wonderfully good way, must be. That sentence still sits behind the work.

contactGate.title: Send a note to the workshop.
contactGate.description: Use this page for project ideas, collaboration, writing feedback, work opportunities, or a specific technical note.

direct.notebookDescription: Read recent notes before sending context.
direct.systemsDescription: See the kind of systems taking shape.

response.title: Response note
response.description: Clear context helps. A useful first message names what exists today, what is blocked, and what kind of next step would help.

tagsIndex.title: An index of topics, tools, and recurring ideas.
tagsIndex.description: Tags are small paths through the workshop: ways to follow what has been written, tested, or slowly made.
tagsIndex.imageAlt: Box of indexed topic notes illustration
tagsIndex.entriesDescription: Not a cloud. Just an index of the recurring paths through the work.

tagPath.title: Notes tagged with “{tag}”
tagPath.description: A small path through related notes, experiments, and systems.
tagPath.emptyTitle: Nothing is on this path yet.
tagPath.emptyDescription: This topic may belong to an old link, or the related notes have not been published yet.

tags.emptyTitle: No content found for this tag
tags.emptyDescription: This tag may belong to an old link, or the related content has not been published yet.

lab.description: A place for prototypes, technical experiments, research fragments, and ideas before they become polished work.

projects.featuredDescription: The main systems currently shaping my public work.

hero.title: A quiet workshop for ideas being slowly made.

workbench.description: Notes, experiments, and useful things currently on the table.

email.title: Programmable email on Cloudflare
email.description: Turning email into an application event.

nekonymous.title: Nekonymous
nekonymous.description: Anonymous messaging, assessment, and matching on the edge.

workshop.label: Current focus
workshop.footer: Less noise, clearer notes, better software — one useful piece at a time.

tracks.title: Three paths through the workshop
tracks.description: Notebook records the thinking, Lab keeps the tests visible, and Systems show what was made useful.

blog.description: Notes on software, product decisions, and the practice of building.

lab.title: Lab
lab.description: Prototypes, research fragments, and ideas still being tested.

projects.title: Systems
projects.description: Open-source work, practical tools, and useful product work.

items.smallUseful: Build small, useful things before giving them large names.
items.preservePath: Write the path, not only the polished result.
items.clearInterfaces: Prefer clear interfaces, stable tools, and honest constraints.
items.openWorkshop: Keep the work open enough to be reviewed, forked, and improved.

notebook.title: Notebook
notebook.description: Essays, build notes, lab logs, and unfinished thoughts from the workshop.

builtSystems.title: Built systems
builtSystems.description: Small useful things made from notes, experiments, and product questions.

closing.quote: Build small things well. Observe. Test. Make slowly.

newsletter.title: Follow the work as it is made.
newsletter.description: Read the notes, explore the useful things taking shape, and see the decisions behind the work. Occasional notes on product engineering, Cloudflare-native systems, AI workflows, and open-source experiments.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive occasional emails from Mohetios.dev. I can unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.pending: Please check your inbox to confirm your subscription.
newsletter.privacyNote: No spam. Just occasional technical notes.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.

comments.title: Discussion
comments.moderationNote: Thoughtful comments, corrections, and questions are welcome. Comments are reviewed before publishing.
comments.success: Thanks — your comment is waiting for review.
comments.error: Your comment could not be submitted. Please try again.
comments.empty: No comments yet. Start the discussion.
comments.privacyNote: Your email is used only for moderation updates. It is not shown publicly.

validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.nameMax: Name must be 80 characters or less.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.emailMax: Email must be 254 characters or less.
validation.commentMax: Comment must be 4000 characters or less.
validation.htmlNotAllowed: HTML is not allowed in comments.
validation.maxLinks: Comments may include at most 2 links.
validation.rateLimitIp: You can post up to 2 comments every 5 minutes. Please wait and try again.
validation.rateLimitEmail: You can post up to 3 comments every 12 hours with this email. Please try again later.
validation.rateLimitReply: You can post 1 reply every 5 minutes. Please wait and try again.
validation.rateLimitGraph: Too many requests right now. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

validation.name: Please enter your name.
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.message: Please write a little more context.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What exists today? What is blocked? What would make the next step clearer?
form.privacyNote: Your message goes straight to my private inbox. No newsletter. No automated marketing.

success.title: Message received.
success.description: Thanks for the context. I will read it carefully and reply when there is a clear fit.

error.title: Message could not be sent.
error.description: Please try again in a moment.
error.migration: The contact inbox table is missing. Apply the latest database migration.
error.verificationDescription: Please complete the verification before sending your message.

sidebar.label: Useful context first
sidebar.title: A short, specific note beats a long pitch.
sidebar.description: Tell me what exists today, what is blocked, and what kind of help would clarify the next step.

work.title: Best fit
work.description: Product engineering, frontend architecture, AI workflows, dashboards, and practical technical writing.

response.title: How I reply
response.description: Specific messages with real context come first. Generic outreach usually does not.

sidebar.label: Around the site
sidebar.title: Where to go next
sidebar.description: Notebook, Lab, and Systems are the three main tracks on Mohetios.dev — each shows a different stage of the work.

latestWriting.description: Recent notes and engineering records from the notebook.
